task.title: Review a Migration Plan
task.shortdesc: Review plan actions before execution to confirm targets, intent, and evidence lineage.

prereq.p: Generate plan.json from a normalized planning input file.
For first-time onboarding, review at least the first twenty actions and all action-type groups before execution.

info.codeblock: jq '{plan_version, generated_at, source_discovery, intent, action_count: (.actions | length)}' build/plan.json
jq '.actions | group_by(.type) | map({type: .[0].type, count: length})' build/plan.json

step.cmd: Review selected actions for target paths and reasons.

info.codeblock: jq '.actions[:20] | map({id, type, target, reason, derived_from_evidence})' build/plan.json

step.cmd: Check for unexpected target roots or custom action types.

info.codeblock: jq '.actions[] | select((.target | startswith("target/")) | not) | {id, type, target}' build/plan.json

result.p: You confirm that plan intent matches your migration objective before execution runs.
result.codeblock: plan_version: 1 action_count: > 0 actions[].id pattern: action-0001, action-0002, ...
